summary: Show the machine-readable default-route contract for startup, lifecycle, skills, validation, and combined installs.

reads.surface: verbose flag for broad diagnostic output

steps.description: Filter to one section when requested.
Emit defaults in the requested format.

guards: Unknown sections should be treated as usage errors.
proof: defaults payload truth is stored as a declarative JSON resource and copied into generated workspace output
defaults selected-output text and tiny-router text stay in generated output rather than package fallback

ir_plan.summary: Defaults report executes generated operation IR through codegen-owned primitive dataflow; generated workspace output loads the defaults payload from generated _contracts/payload.json and owns tiny-router, compact-answer, and selected-output text formatting.

steps.description: Load the generated workspace default-route and policy payload resource.
Select a section, tiny profile, or exact field projection from the defaults payload.
Emit the selected defaults payload in the requested format.
